offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We provide invoice reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of subcontractor invoices with project budgets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction project managers with demo video
Forums where construction project managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and budget tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
